## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Insert a media URL.
2. Choose the desired format or quality preset.
3. Click download.
4. Observe the error.

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
